content.en:
"Black earth!"

Ye Tian walked on it, and the void around him became weird, and it was very dangerous to look here.

However, he was soon attracted to a boulder.

This is not an ordinary stone, but a very rare material - the ancient stone of reincarnation.

The Reincarnation Ancient Tree is an incomparably rare material in the land of eternity, and the reincarnation ancient gold can be extracted from the reincarnation ancient stone, and with enough reincarnation ancient gold, the medium other side of the treasure can evolve into a high other side of the treasure.

It can be said that any Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor would be thrilled when he saw the Reincarnation Ancient Stone.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled over and put away this reincarnation ancient stone.

"It is estimated that there is more than this reincarnation ancient stone here, if there are enough reincarnation ancient trees, I can evolve my medium other shore treasure into a high other shore treasure, then my strength will definitely skyrocket!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

He continued to search for the Ancient Stone of Reincarnation.

After a while, he found a reincarnation ancient stone again.

This reincarnation ancient stone is slightly smaller.

He put away the ancient stone of reincarnation and was about to continue his search, when the copy talent sensed the approaching of a creature.

【Reincarnation Ancient Snake】

The strength of these reincarnation ancient snakes is afraid that it is comparable to the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and there are six of them.

"Trouble!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Airplanes!!!!

A series of reincarnation seals appeared around him, blocking the void around him, and it was the reincarnation ancient snake that launched an attack on him.

"Fight!"

Ye Tian fought with these reincarnation ancient snakes.

However, his strength was only worthy of reaching the top Origin Upper Realm, not their opponent, and after fighting hard for a long time, he only severely damaged one of the reincarnation ancient snakes, and then fell and died.

The fall of this replica body caused the two ancient stones of reincarnation he found to be lost.

......

"Gotta make a duplicate of the body!"

However, instead of copying his copy body this time, he copied the copy body of the Reincarnation Blood Eater and let the Reincarnation Blood Eater copy body go to the place where the Reincarnation Ancient Stone was.

Soon.

The replica body of the reincarnation blood eater was successfully copied, and it set off.

However, when he came to the Ancient Stone of Reincarnation, he was discovered by the Ancient Snake of Reincarnation.

The reincarnation ancient snake directly attacked the reincarnation blood-eater replicating body, killing the reincarnation blood-eater replicating body.

"It seems that these creatures have their own territory, and I use the reincarnation blood eater to copy the body, which is equivalent to crossing the territory, so it will definitely not work!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He had to replicate the body of a reincarnation serpent.

He tried to copy, but the copy failed.

Because the cultivation of those reincarnation ancient snakes was equivalent to the peak Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm, he naturally couldn't copy it.

However, he could continue to search for the Reincarnation Ancient Snake, and he would definitely be able to find a Reincarnation Ancient Snake that had cultivated to a level comparable to that of the Late Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm.

After a period of time, Ye Tian successfully found it.

"Start copying!"

It didn't take long for him to successfully copy a reincarnation ancient snake, so he used the reincarnation ancient snake to go to that area, and successfully found the reincarnation ancient stone.

The reincarnation ancient snakes didn't look down on the reincarnation ancient stone, so they naturally didn't take it away.

After Ye Tian found it, he took these reincarnation ancient stones away and sent them to his true body copy body, which was kept by the real body copy body.

In the following years, he searched for the ancient stone of reincarnation in the territory of the ancient snake of reincarnation, and also found other good things, such as good things that helped to improve the origin of the other side, and he found a lot.

"There are a lot of good things, if you are other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, where can you be willing to go!" Ye Tian muttered.

Since it was a reincarnation ancient snake replicating its body to find resources and treasures, Ye Tian naturally did not encounter danger, and found more and more things.

And the other side.

His replica body has been cultivating, extracting reincarnation ancient gold from the reincarnation ancient stone, and then using the reincarnation ancient gold to enhance his other treasure.

Moreover, he also used a bunch of resources to improve his other origin.

Ye Tiandu died twice, although it was a bit reckless, but other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors would naturally encounter danger.

As many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors went deep into this Void Treasure Land, more and more Origin Upper Realms had fallen.

......

"Poof!"

The Lord of Ice and Rain escaped from one place, vomiting blood and cracking all over.

"It's too dangerous here, fortunately I escaped with a treasure, otherwise even if my strength is increased several times, I won't be able to die!" said the Lord of Ice and Rain.

She escaped by luck this time, and she wasn't going to go any deeper, so she just looked for resources at the outermost periphery.

And as a Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm went deeper, the map of this treasure land was gradually pieced together.

"It's really dangerous here, there are a lot of places where you can kill the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor!" said the Desolate Blood Ancestor secretly.

"You guys go in too, these places are still relatively safe, don't go to other places!" the Desolate Blood Ancestor instructed several of the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace.

"Yes!"

They answered, and then entered the treasure land.

......

The years passed.

Ye Tian's other origin is getting stronger and stronger, and there are more and more reincarnation ancient gold on his body.

Now.

He had already extracted a lot of Reincarnation Ancient Gold, which he was going to use to evolve his Medium Treasure of the Other Side.

"Let's start evolving the Arcana of the Other Shore!"

Ye Tian integrated all the extracted reincarnation ancient gold into his own treasure.

Rumble!!!!!

As a large amount of Reincarnation Ancient Gold was consumed, the Medium Treasure of the Other Shore began to ascend.

The years passed, after the long years had passed.

This medium treasure is finally about to transform, and once the transformation is successful, it will be a high treasure on the other side.

Ye Tian quietly waited for the transformation of the treasure on the other side.

After a long time, the metamorphosis is finally complete.

"It worked!"

At this moment, this medium and other side treasure spear has been transformed into a high other side of the treasure.

"With this high-grade treasure spear, my strength has improved a lot!"

He immediately swapped out the other replica bodies one by one.

In this way, the strength of his true body copy body has all increased.

In these years, he has also absorbed and refined a lot of treasure resources, and the origin of the other side is estimated to be about to increase to the level of 40 million.

And.

He also found some treasures that would help improve the Origin Rules of the other side, but the effect was not very good, and it would take a long time before he could hope to raise the Origin Rules of the Other Shore to the realm of ninety percent and six.

But this time, he found an incomparably amazing treasure.
